name: Sonny Burke
description: American musical arranger, composer, big band leader and producer (1914–1980)
abstract: Joseph Francis "Sonny" Burke (March 22, 1914 – May 31, 1980) was an American musical arranger, composer, Big Band leader, and producer. He was a prominent figure in the U.S.

works_created.t: Somebody Bigger Than You and I

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Conniff
about_quotes.evidence: I called all of them and told them, “hey I’m free now, I’m not writing steady all of the time for Harry, I’m available.” And boy, for two years the phone hardly rang. ... like Sonny Burke at Decca and Paul Weston was at Columbia Records.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Conniff interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Diego, California, February 14, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Mingus
about_quotes.evidence: he was at the piano with Sonny Burke, showing Sonny 'How High The Moon', and they were writing -- I didn't know they were writing a tune
